candidates.reason: INTAKE misread billed_amount as $52,000 — correct value is $5,200
ADJUSTER trimmed payout to tier cap — plausible suspect, but replay does not flip
COVERAGE inherited the inflated billed_amount and applied the wrong cap

rationale: INTAKE extracted billed_amount=$52,000 from the claim form instead of $5,200 — a 10× read error. Every downstream agent trusted that figure: COVERAGE capped at the $8,000 tier limit and PAYOUT disbursed $8,000. The correct payout is $5,200. Injecting billed_amount=5200 at INTAKE and replaying flips the oracle FAIL → PASS in 5/5 runs.
